auditor_findings.finding: No active rollout-stage UI controls, raw command_id browser payload, raw argv browser payload, arbitrary command execution, direct evidence/log/state reads, or false pilot/scale claims found in the web/action boundary.
Current canon does not support promoting observed 16-account evidence to 20-account proof or desktop admission.
Existing live mutation requests such as sync/mode/account lifecycle/API route actions remain bounded and confirmation/post-refresh driven; they are not rollout-stage mutation controls.

commands_reported_by_auditors: rg scans over web UI, live server, command adapter, tests, and canon docs
nl -ba inspections of web/action files and canon docs
